components.desc: sqlite schema + deterministic idempotent seeder (python3 stdlib): tweets table (id, handle, name, avatar_color, text, ts, replies, retweets, likes), WAL journal_mode, busy_timeout>=2000ms; seeds >=8 tweets from >=4 users with fixed ts strings, distinct avatar colors, non-zero counts; re-run produces no duplicates. check.sh: seed twice into temp DB, assert row count stable, schema fields present, WAL mode on.

python3 ThreadingHTTPServer instance taking port via argv/env, shared sqlite DB via db-seed module: GET /api/health -> {ok,port}; GET /api/timeline -> newest-first limit 50 with exact F1 schema; POST /api/tweets -> 201 + tweet JSON, 400 on missing/empty/>280-char text; GET / serves UI HTML file. check.sh: boot one instance on port 0, curl health/timeline/post/400 cases, kill via trap.

stdlib reverse proxy: strict round-robin over 3 backend ports, forwards method/path/query/headers/body, returns backend response verbatim + X-Backend header; thread-safe counters; GET /lb-stats answered locally with per-backend counts + total; backend connect failure -> 502 JSON, counter not incremented. check.sh: spin 3 stub http.server backends on free ports, verify rotation, X-Backend, /lb-stats totals, 502 on dead backend.

single self-contained HTML (inline CSS/SVG, no external URLs) faithful to X dark theme: #000 bg, #2f3336 borders, #e7e9ea/#71767b text, #1d9bf0 accent, system-ui font; left nav rail with X logo + Home/Explore/Notifications/Messages/Profile SVG icons (Home active) + Post button; ~600px center column with sticky Home header, compose box (avatar circle, placeholder, Post button disabled until text), tweet cards with colored-initial avatars, name/@handle·ts line, text, reply/retweet/like/views SVG action row; right column with search pill + What's happening card; JS fetches /api/timeline, renders fixed ts strings, POST /api/tweets on compose then re-render; no animations/autofocus. check.sh: static asserts — no http(s):// external refs, required hex colors, key layout markers, fetch calls present.

python3 stdlib script with --requests (300), --concurrency (10), --url: ~80% GET /api/timeline / 20% POST /api/tweets through proxy using threads; then fetch /lb-stats, print per-backend counts, req/s, latency p50/p95; exit 0 iff every backend within 10% of mean else nonzero. check.sh: run against 3 stub backends behind reverse-proxy on free ports, assert exit 0 on balanced and nonzero on forced skew.

run.sh: seed DB, boot 3 backends (default 9101/9102/9103 or env-overridable ports) + proxy (8080), wait all healthy <5s, print URLs, trap-kill children; run.sh --check verifies A1 (3 consecutive health calls hit 3 ports), A2 (timeline schema newest-first), A3 (POST via proxy visible from different backend), A4 (/lb-stats total matches + load-stand balance), A5 (GET / has no external URLs, contains nav rail/compose/cards), exits by result. check.sh: run run.sh --check with free ports.

golden screenshot check for A6: script boots stack on free ports via run-harness, uses ../../evals/snap to capture / at 1280x800, compares with evalshot against committed golden.png (generate golden on first run); asserts dark bg, nav rail, compose box, >=3 tweet cards visible via pixel/threshold pass. check.sh: run capture+compare non-interactively <60s, trap cleanup.
